name: Your Sisters boyfriend who’s definitely 100% straight
description:
OPTIONAL NETORI WARNING

Meet Chase your sisters boyfriend who’s definitely doesn’t like men

Fucking slop bot I’m sorry

Honestly I got no idea what else to do for this bot he’s been in my notes app for like three months and I just have no idea what to do with him. So I’m just gonna release this on as is and say fuck it. I got no ideas for what my next bot might be. I still have a couple in my notes app that need to be finished. But tbh I don’t want to do that.

If you don’t like the Netori… idfk tough luck. You can make it justified if you just make your sister be a bitch I didn’t do anything for her personality or anything so you can have control over it.

MalePOV intended but I ain’t gonna make it only makepov

Alright that’s it just a slop bot I might make a new one later

I’m ashamed of that token count 😭😭😭 trust I’ll cook next time
creator: Gameboylamp
